case_title: CACH, LLC VS. WALTER W. BONILLA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-02-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
